name: holdem-engine
description: No-Limit Texas Hold'em — pure game-engine value layer (Phase 1a).

scripts.test: node tests/engine.value-layer.test.js && node tests/engine.orchestration.test.js && node tests/ai.core.test.js && node tests/ai.psychology.test.js && node tests/ai.decide.test.js && node tests/ai.gemini.test.js && node tests/ai.llm-decider.test.js && node tests/render.chips.test.js && node tests/render.cards.test.js && node tests/render.table.test.js && node tests/anim.core.test.js && node tests/anim.effects.test.js && node tests/app.controller.test.js && node tests/app.settings.test.js && node tests/acceptance.test.js
scripts.preview: node scripts/preview-chips.mjs && node scripts/preview-cards.mjs && node scripts/preview-table.mjs && node scripts/preview-anim.mjs && node scripts/preview-effects.mjs
